2023-05-24T11:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Cotton Tree Drive (uphill bound) near Hong Kong Park Sports Centre which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-24T11:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的紅棉路(上山方向)近香港公園體育館的部份行車線現已解封。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2023-05-24T11:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the speed limit of Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2023-05-24T11:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2023-05-24T13:51:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the slow lane of Tate's Cairn Highway (Kowloon bound) near Sha Tin Sewage Treatment Works is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-24T13:51:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，大老山公路(往九龍方向)近沙田污水處理廠的慢線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-24T13:57:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tate's Cairn Highway (Kowloon bound) near Sha Tin Sewage Treatment Works which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-24T13:57:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的大老山公路(往九龍方向)近沙田污水處理廠的慢線現已解封。

2023-05-24T14:51:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Chun Shing Factory Estate is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-24T14:51:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，荃灣路(往屯門方向)近晉昇工廠大廈的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-24T16:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Chun Shing Factory Estate is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun bound) ends at Kwai Chung Road near Lai King MTR Station.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-05-24T16:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，荃灣路(往屯門方向)近晉昇工廠大廈的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在荃灣路(往屯門方向)的車龍龍尾已到葵涌道近荔景港鐵站。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-05-24T16:07:00.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of Ng Fong Street and part of the lanes of Sze Mei Street which were closed due to fire are re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-24T16:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因火警而封閉的五芳街的唯一行車線及四美街的部份行車線現已解封。
